description: Template for company qualification analysis specs

categories.label: Not Qualified
categories.description: Company does not meet qualification criteria

categories.label: Insufficient Information
categories.description: Cannot determine qualification from available data

_comment_extraction_fields: Data to extract from the page (optional)
_comment_questions: Qualification questions to answer - CUSTOMIZE THESE

questions.question: Is this company a distributor (buys from manufacturers and sells to others)?
Does this company operate as a wholesaler (B2B sales, bulk quantities)?
What product categories does this company deal with?
How confident are you in these answers based on the available information?

_comment_sufficiency: Configuration for determining if enough info exists

sufficiency_check.prompt_addition: Before answering, assess if the provided content contains enough information to confidently answer the qualification questions. If not, indicate which types of pages would help (e.g., 'about page', 'products page', 'services page').
